short_blurb: Licensed roofing contractor serving Compton homeowners and businesses.
local_note: Compton is experiencing reinvestment and renovation activity, and roofing is often a key part of property improvements. We work throughout Compton on residential replacements and commercial flat-roof projects. We're licensed in LA County, carry full insurance, and deliver quality work that holds up — not the cut-rate jobs that fail in two years.

faqs.q: How can I verify your license before hiring you in Compton?
faqs.a: Our CSLB license number is #1109337. You can verify it instantly at the California State License Board's website at cslb.ca.gov. Always verify any contractor's license before hiring.
